prestazioni: Replace the stock 1,973cc Type 907 I4 (engine code: 907) with a fully forged internals build featuring JE Pistons 87mm forged slugs (9.5:1 compression), Cunningham conrods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth for 8,500 RPM reliability. Pair with a custom dry-sump oiling system by Aviaid to prevent oil starvation under lateral G-forces.

Install a custom turbocharger setup using a Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbo (0.64 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom air-to-water intercooler by Bell Intercoolers (core dimensions: 12x6x3 inches).

Upgrade the fuel system with a set of Bosch Motorsport 0280158037 320cc/min injectors, a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump, and a custom ECU tune by Emerald K6+ standalone ECU with individual cylinder trimming for the 907's uneven firing order (1-3-4-2).
estetica: Replace the stock fiberglass body panels with a full carbon fiber replica kit from Fibre Glass Developments (FGD), including a one-piece front splitter, side skirts, and a ducktail rear spoiler, all finished in satin clear coat for weight reduction (~15kg savings).

Install a set of OZ Racing Superleggera III wheels (15x8 front, 15x10 rear) with custom offsets (+15mm front, +25mm rear) to fill the wheel arches, wrapped in Pirelli P Zero Trofeo R tires (205/50/15 front, 265/45/15 rear) for maximum mechanical grip.

Replace the stock pop-up headlights with a custom fixed-light conversion using Hella 7-inch Bi-Xenon projectors (part #50128801) mounted behind a custom polycarbonate lens by RS Performance, paired with a custom LED halo DRL kit by LUX Automotive.
